content.en:
The reincarnation ruins are very dangerous, and after these members of the reincarnation celestial clan came in, they did not move quickly, but walked cautiously.

Although it is not the first time that the reincarnation ruins have been opened, this treasure monster is strange because the terrain is different every time, and the transformation of time and space, the change of landform, is changing all the time.

The experience of the past is of no use now, and if there are no slaves to scout ahead, it is easy to run into danger.

However, there are a lot of resources in the reincarnation ruins, and they are all very excited, and if they get a little good things, they can break through to the realm of six bloodline awakenings, and their strength and status will far surpass the current one.

So, it's worth the risk.

......

"Come in!"

Ye Tian entered the reincarnation ruins, and felt that the time and space around him were changing, although the change was not fast, the landform was constantly moving, and even the position was changing and moving, making it difficult to lock the location of the outside world.

If there is no special way, I am afraid that I don't even know where the exit is.

Of course.

Those members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan who came in must have a way to find an exit, and he also had a way, and that was to use other replica bodies as coordinates to get himself out.

In short, it's not hard to get out.

"Although Tunxi didn't reveal much information, since these members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan dared to venture in, they must have a lot of resources here, otherwise there was no need to take risks!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But.

He currently needs to find a place to replicate other replica bodies.

The other side.

Blood Howl led a dozen Red Skull Giants and other slave races slowly forward, and those slave races didn't know their role, but they weren't stupid, and they could already see that this place was not ordinary.

At this moment, they were a little scared, but they didn't dare to resist the blood howl.

In the dark realm of reincarnation, the slave race did not dare to rebel, and none of those who rebelled had a good end.

Moreover, they can't beat the blood howl, the difference in strength is too big!

"You, go ahead and walk!"

Blood Howl commanded as he pointed at a red-skulled giant.

"Blood-sirling, I'm ......"

The red-skulled giant was a little frightened, and seemed reluctant.

"If you don't go, die!"

The terrifying aura of blood howls filled the air, forcing the Red Skull Giant to pass.

"Bloodhowl-sama, I'll go!"

The red-skulled giant passed slowly.

And Blood Howl keeps a distance from the other slaves, and the change of the reincarnation ruins is very slow, so this way can be used to find out the danger in advance.

It didn't take long for the Red Skull Giant to be in danger!

Burst!

The body of the Red Skull Giant seemed to be squeezed by two pieces of heaven and earth, and in an instant, half of his body was directly crushed.

However, the Red Skull Giant did not die, and escaped in time, quickly healing half of his body, but the injuries were not light.

"Come back!"

The sound of blood howling came.

The crimson giant was so frightened that he immediately returned, still terrified.

He had no idea what was going on, and he almost died!

"Lord Bloodhowl, there are no enemies, what is the situation?" the Crimson Giant asked.

Blood Howl smiled, "The time, space, and landscape of the reincarnation ruins are all moving, but there are places where the movement does not follow the law, but is squeezing each other. This kind of squeezing seems to be very slow, but if it is encountered, even the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm will be squeezed, and if he can't react in time, he will naturally die. You're seriously injured now, so heal while you follow. "

Subsequently.

Blood Howl assigns another slave to explore other places.

The slave was also afraid, but he did not dare not go, and if he went, at least there was hope of survival.

However.

What all the slaves don't know at this moment is that the danger of this kind of squeezing is not the most dangerous in the reincarnation ruins, and there are many dangerous situations, but the blood howl will definitely not say.

With the passage of time, many of the slaves under the command of the members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan have fallen.

And Ye Tian also found a place and began to copy Aochen's body.

He didn't copy his true body copy body, once the real body copy body was exposed and attracted the attention of the high-level of the reincarnation celestial clan, it would not be good.

Therefore, he only copied the Aochen copy body.

......

"Replication successful!"

The second Aochen copy body was copied out, and then moved on.

Soon.

He found a resource - reincarnation gray grass!

The reincarnation gray grass is a very common resource in the reincarnation dark domain, but it is also for the reincarnation celestial clans, and those slave races are still very eager for this reincarnation gray grass.

It's just because the reincarnation gray grass can be used to make some kind of secret medicine to help the Origin Ancestor on the other side to awaken for the first time.

For those Origin Upper Realm Overlords who have not embarked on the three paths, the value of the Reincarnation Grey Grass is very high, and it is an incomparably precious thing in the land of eternity, but there are many of them here.

"The Reincarnation Grey Grass is of little use to me, but it can be used to cultivate Terran or Tianshan Pavilion members. "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian collected the reincarnation gray grass here, and then returned to another copy body, and handed over these reincarnation gray grass to another copy body, and then continued to explore the reincarnation ruins.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a lot of reincarnation gray grass and some other resources.

"No wonder those members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan want to come here to explore, the resources here are too rich, if those Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the Land of Eternity know about it, they will definitely go crazy!" Ye Tian said darkly.

At the same time, he also had to envy the resources of the Reincarnation Dark Domain, with so many resources, the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan would naturally be extremely powerful, far from being comparable to those forces in the land on the other side of eternity.

this day.

Ye Tian walked into the place where the two heavens and the earth were squeezed.

In an instant, his body began to shatter.

However, he withdrew in time, and only a fifth of his body was shattered.

"It's two heavens and the earth, and it's so silent that I don't even notice it. Ye Tian frowned slightly.

No wonder they want to find a slave to find a way, if they encounter such a situation themselves, even if they don't die, they will have to be hit hard!

This kind of heaven and earth squeeze is simply ignoring the strength of cultivation, no matter how strong the strength is, it is difficult to resist the power of the reincarnation of the ruins of the world!

The more powerful the members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, the more terrifying the squeeze they may endure.

Therefore, in the face of this danger, the reincarnation celestial clan can only avoid it, and cannot erase it.

Ye Tian originally thought that the reincarnation ruins were only one kind of danger, but soon, he encountered other dangerous situations.
